title: WiseTech Academy LMS Architecture
summary: Defined and delivered LMS architecture across billing, integrations, proctoring, and CI/CD foundations, improving platform extensibility and release reliability.

title: CargoWise Integration and ETL Orchestration
summary: Designed and built ETL-driven XML integration workflows between CargoWise and external ecosystems including customs, government agencies, ocean liners, and air transport providers.

title: MyMissionHub Release Automation
summary: Implemented GitHub Actions release automation with auto versioning, artifact packaging, and deployment guardrails to reduce manual overhead and improve release consistency.

title: LMS Billing and Proctoring Delivery
summary: Led billing and proctoring delivery from architecture through implementation, aligning product requirements, integration dependencies, and CI/CD-ready rollout patterns.

title: AI-Guided Team Workflow Integration
summary: Rolled out instruction-governed, persona-based AI collaboration patterns to improve consistency across architecture, development, QA, and release operations while preserving clear role accountability.

title: Enterprise Platform Transition Leadership
summary: Led modernization planning and implementation across integration, web, and data layers, balancing technical debt reduction against ongoing delivery commitments.
